message:
feat(e2e): Add mobile device projects and browser capability tests

P6.2 (Cross-Browser Testing) improvements:

- Add mobile-chrome (Pixel 5) and mobile-safari (iPhone 12) projects
  to playwright.config.ts for mobile device testing
- Create browser-apis.spec.ts with capability detection tests:
  - WebCrypto API availability (with secure context handling)
  - Web Worker and Blob API detection
  - Essential JavaScript APIs (TextEncoder, ArrayBuffer, etc.)
  - Storage API detection (localStorage, sessionStorage, IndexedDB)
  - Mobile viewport support tests
  - Cross-browser feature parity tests (JSON, fetch, URL)

Tests gracefully skip when APIs require secure context (HTTPS)
which may be unavailable on file:// URLs in some browsers.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
